sol: 1/cosec θ = sin θ. The maximum value of sin θ is 1.

q: The value of tan 1° tan 2° tan 3° ... tan 89° is:
sol: tan θ * tan(90-θ) = 1. All terms pair up to 1, and tan 45° = 1.

q: If sin θ + sin² θ = 1, then the value of (cos² θ + cos⁴ θ) is:
sol: sin θ = 1 - sin² θ = cos² θ. So, cos² θ + cos⁴ θ = sin θ + sin² θ = 1.
